properties.label: IM - Redeem Voucher
properties.content:
Redeem Voucher

Use this screen to record a farmer\'s collection of subsidised inputs at a Resource Centre. The system validates the voucher and atomically updates the voucher status, the centre\'s inventory, and the redemption audit log.

Scan the QR code on the farmer\'s phone, or type the voucher code shown.
The Resource Centre where this redemption is happening. Must match the voucher\'s allocated centre.
Leave blank to redeem the full voucher quantity. Use this only for partial redemption.

properties.label: IM - Print Voucher Slip
properties.content:
SUBSIDY VOUCHER
Lesotho Farmers Portal
Ministry of Agriculture, Food Security and Nutrition
—
Farmer (NID)—
Issued—
Farmer name—
Programme code—
Status—
Input—
Collection centre—
Quantity entitled
—
Expires
—
Farmer signature / thumbprint
Distribution Agent signature
Present this slip and the voucher code at the listed centre on or before the expiry date. One redemption per voucher. Replacement is not possible if the slip is lost — the voucher code remains valid in the system.

properties.comment: Phase 3 IM Slice 1 — foundational MD + im_input_catalog + im_supplier (per im-module SAD §5.1).
properties.label: Inputs Management

properties.subheader:
<script>
(function () {
  function dispositionFor(text) {
    var t = (text || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (t === 'eligibility_passed')           return ['Passed',         'regbb-pill-passed'];
    if (t === 'eligibility_failed_mandatory') return ['Failed',         'regbb-pill-failed'];
    if (t === 'eligibility_pending_review')   return ['Pending review', 'regbb-pill-pending_review'];
    if (t === 'indeterminate')                return ['Indeterminate',  'regbb-pill-indeterminate'];
    if (t === '' || t === '-' || t === 'null') return ['—',             'regbb-pill-na'];
    return [text, 'regbb-pill-na'];
  }
  function statusFor(text) {
    var t = (text || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (t === 'approved')                     return ['Approved',           'regbb-pill-approved'];
    if (t === 'auto_approved')                return ['Auto-approved',      'regbb-pill-auto_approved'];
    if (t === 'rejected')                     return ['Rejected',           'regbb-pill-rejected'];
    if (t === 'auto_rejected')                return ['Auto-rejected',      'regbb-pill-auto_rejected'];
    if (t === 'pending_operator_review')      return ['Pending review',     'regbb-pill-pending'];
    if (t === 'pending_data_clarification')   return ['Pending data',       'regbb-pill-pending'];
    if (t === 'sent_back')                    return ['Sent back',          'regbb-pill-sent_back'];
    if (t === '' || t === '-' || t === 'null') return ['—',                 'regbb-pill-na'];
    return [text, 'regbb-pill-na'];
  }
  function decorate() {
    var $ = window.jQuery;
    if (typeof $ === 'undefined') return;
    $('td.column_disposition').each(function () {
      var $td = $(this);
      if ($td.find('.regbb-pill').length > 0) return;
      var info = dispositionFor($td.text());
      $td.empty().append($('<span/>').addClass('regbb-pill').addClass(info[1]).text(info[0]));
    });
    $('td.column_status').each(function () {
      var $td = $(this);
      if ($td.find('.regbb-pill').length > 0) return;
      var info = statusFor($td.text());
      $td.empty().append($('<span/>').addClass('regbb-pill').addClass(info[1]).text(info[0]));
    });
  }
  /* Bind ajaxComplete as soon as jQuery is available — irrespective of
     whether the current page has any datalist cells. This handles the
     navigate-from-form-to-list flow where the bootstrap fires on a form
     page (no cells, would otherwise stop polling) but a later Ajax load
     brings in the datalist. */
  function bindAjax() {
    var $ = window.jQuery;
    if ($ && $.fn && !window.__regbbPillsAjaxBound) {
      $(document).ajaxComplete(function () { setTimeout(decorate, 30); });
      window.__regbbPillsAjaxBound = true;
      return true;
    }
    return false;
  }
  var attempts = 0;
  function poll() {
    bindAjax();
    decorate();
    if (++attempts < 60) setTimeout(poll, 150);
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', poll);
  } else {
    poll();
  }
  window.addEventListener('load', poll);
  /* Joget triggers a custom 'page_loaded' event after datalist navigations
     in some themes — listen too if it's available. */
  document.addEventListener('page_loaded', function () { setTimeout(decorate, 30); }, false);
})();
</script>
